nasb.text: He put shields and spears in every city and strengthened them greatly. So he held Judah and Benjamin.

esv.text: And he put shields and spears in all the cities and made them very strong. So he held Judah and Benjamin.

cnv.text: 又在各城裝備了大盾牌和矛槍，使這些城市十分堅固。這樣，猶大和便雅憫都在他統治之下。

ccb.text: 他在城内储备盾牌和矛枪，使城池非常坚固。犹大和便雅悯都归属他。
